name: python3-repoze.lru
title: python3-repoze.lru
summary: tiny LRU cache implementation and decorator for Python 3
description:
tiny LRU cache implementation and decorator for Python 3
repoze.lru is a LRU (least recently used) cache implementation. Keys and
values that are not used frequently will be evicted from the cache faster
than keys and values that are used frequently.
.
This is the Python 3 version of the package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-repoze.lru because tiny LRU cache implementation and decorator for Python 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-repoze.lru as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-repoze.lru with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-repoze.lru --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
